title: Anvil Legacy
description: Mod expanding Reign, allowing players to reforge their gear to unlock its hidden power.
body:
This mod introduces an engaging mechanic that transforms standard Minecraft equipment — swords, axes, bows, and armor — into powerful relics. Reveal the **true** name of your sword! 

From the developers of [Reign](https://modrinth.com/mod/reignmod). ![Crown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e5083a09ddddca700e89647ce786e26c1a4a5b.png)
Stay tuned for more news in the [developer diary](https://t.me/reignmod),
and test the mod on [our server](https://t.me/reignserver)!
# Unleash the power
Standard items can ascend to legendary status through renaming in an anvil. With a certain degree of luck, the chosen name is "accepted," granting the item unique attributes. The chance of success depends on the number of levels spent when renaming.
![info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de6d78fd4f357e72c39a753cae5b4dcd479383f9_0.webp)

## 🌟 Potential Relic Properties
When transformed, items may gain one of the following attributes:

- Increased damage (swords, axes, bows).
- Boosted attack speed.
- Enhanced armor and armor toughness (armor pieces).
- Improved knockback resistance (armor).
- Unbreakability: item durability no longer decreases.
- Over-enchanting: enables enchantments beyond normal limits.
#
_Once an item becomes a legendary or transcendent relic, it cannot be altered..._
#
## ⚒️ Gameplay
1. Creating a Legendary Relic
2. Place the desired item in an anvil.
3. Enter any name. If the name is "accepted" (determined by chance), the item transforms into a legendary relic.
#

<details>
<summary>But what if legendary is just the gateway to transcendence?</summary>
Maybe answer lies in unveiling the relic's true name?
</details>


![Footer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f453bdbc5b1cf5a4d83c1b86c52d1fdb376ee2ef_0.webp)
